stemHtml: An aircraft is taking off in poor weather conditions with the potential for thunderstorms. It is advisable that the airborne weather radar is...

options.a: set to zero tilt ready for the pitch-up in the climb.
options.b: switched off at all times on the ground.
options.c: switched to map mode while the aircraft is below 1000 feet.
options.d: tilted slightly upward during the take-off run.
